history.created_by: RUN |4 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive /bin/sh -c apt-get update   && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends        ca-certificates        curl        docker.io        git        iptables        libatomic1        libfreetype6        python3        python3-pip        python3-venv        sudo        tini        uidmap        zstd   && apt-get clean   && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # buildkit

RUN |5 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 /bin/sh -c mkdir -p $NVM_DIR   && curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.3/install.sh | bash   && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install ${NODE_VERSION}   && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use v${NODE_VERSION}   && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm alias default v${NODE_VERSION}   && npm install -g pnpm@latest-10   && rm -rf /root/.npm   && rm -rf /tmp/node-compile-cache   && node --version   && npm --version   && nvm cache clear   && npm cache clean --force # buildkit

RUN |6 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 /bin/sh -c curl -o apache-maven.tar.gz https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/maven/apache-maven/${MAVEN_VERSION}/apache-maven-${MAVEN_VERSION}-bin.tar.gz     && tar -xzf apache-maven.tar.gz     && mkdir -p /opt/maven     && mv apache-maven-${MAVEN_VERSION} /opt/maven     && rm apache-maven.tar.gz # buildkit

RUN |6 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 /bin/sh -c update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python python /usr/bin/python3 1   && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/pip pip /usr/bin/pip3 1   && python --version   && pip --version # buildkit

RUN |7 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 /bin/sh -c curl -LSs https://go.dev/dl/go${GO_VERSION}.${TARGETOS}-${TARGETARCH}.tar.gz --output go.tar.gz   && tar -C /usr/local -xzf go.tar.gz   && rm go.tar.gz # buildkit
RUN |7 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 /bin/sh -c go version # buildkit

RUN |7 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 /bin/sh -c set -eu;     cd /tmp;     ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture);     VER=$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/cli/cli/releases/latest             | grep '"tag_name"' | cut -d'"' -f4);     VER="${VER#v}";     DIR="gh_${VER}_linux_${ARCH}";     curl -fLO "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/download/v${VER}/${DIR}.tar.gz";     tar -xzf "${DIR}.tar.gz";     install -m 0755 "${DIR}/bin/gh" /usr/local/bin/gh-bin;     rm -rf "${DIR}" "${DIR}.tar.gz";     /usr/local/bin/gh-bin --version # buildkit

RUN |7 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 /bin/sh -c chmod +x /usr/local/bin/gh # buildkit

RUN |8 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 GEMINI_VERSION=0.26.0 /bin/sh -c npm install -g "@google/gemini-cli@$GEMINI_VERSION" && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /root/.npm # buildkit

RUN |9 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 GEMINI_VERSION=0.26.0 CLAUDE_CODE_ACP_VERSION=0.12.2 /bin/sh -c npm install -g "@zed-industries/claude-code-acp@$CLAUDE_CODE_ACP_VERSION" && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /root/.npm # buildkit

RUN |10 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 GEMINI_VERSION=0.26.0 CLAUDE_CODE_ACP_VERSION=0.12.2 JUNIE_VERSION=704.1.0 /bin/sh -c npm install -g "@jetbrains/junie-cli@$JUNIE_VERSION" && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /root/.npm # buildkit

RUN |10 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 GEMINI_VERSION=0.26.0 CLAUDE_CODE_ACP_VERSION=0.12.2 JUNIE_VERSION=704.1.0 /bin/sh -c useradd workspace-agent       --create-home       --home-dir /home/workspace-agent       --shell /bin/bash       --uid 22222       --gid $(getent group docker | cut -d: -f3)       --no-log-init       --groups sudo       --no-user-group   && passwd -d workspace-agent # buildkit

RUN |11 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 GEMINI_VERSION=0.26.0 CLAUDE_CODE_ACP_VERSION=0.12.2 JUNIE_VERSION=704.1.0 EMBARK_VERSION=0.8.178 /bin/sh -c if [ "$TARGETARCH" = "amd64" ]; then       curl -fsSL https://embark.labs.jb.gg/install.sh | bash -s -- --version=$EMBARK_VERSION --no-path-update       && /home/workspace-agent/.embark/bin/embark setup-agent --agent=claude --mcp --skills --instructions --non-interactive       && /home/workspace-agent/.embark/bin/embark setup-agent --agent=codex  --mcp --skills --instructions --non-interactive       && /home/workspace-agent/.embark/bin/embark setup-agent --agent=gemini --mcp --skills --instructions --non-interactive;     else       echo "Skipping EmbArk install: no Linux/$TARGETARCH binary available yet";     fi # buildkit

RUN |11 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 GEMINI_VERSION=0.26.0 CLAUDE_CODE_ACP_VERSION=0.12.2 JUNIE_VERSION=704.1.0 EMBARK_VERSION=0.8.178 /bin/sh -c mkdir -p /home/workspace-agent/.gemini # buildkit

RUN |11 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive NODE_VERSION=25.2.1 MAVEN_VERSION=3.9.13 GO_VERSION=1.25.4 GEMINI_VERSION=0.26.0 CLAUDE_CODE_ACP_VERSION=0.12.2 JUNIE_VERSION=704.1.0 EMBARK_VERSION=0.8.178 /bin/sh -c echo '{"security":{"auth":{"selectedType":"gemini-api-key" }}}' > /home/workspace-agent/.gemini/settings.json # buildkit

RUN |8 JBR_VERSION=25.0.2-329.111 TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64 TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETOS=linux JBR_VERSION=25.0.2-329.111 FLEET_VERSION=261.643 SH_SCRIPT_FOLDER=/usr/local/bin LOG_CONFIG_FOLDER=/home/workspace-agent/.config/JetBrains/Air /bin/sh -c mkdir -p "/home/workspace-agent/.cache/JetBrains/Air/artifacts/$JBR_VERSION/jbr"     && fleet_docker_platform="$(resolve-fleet-docker-platform "$TARGETARCH")"     && curl -LSs "https://plugins.jetbrains.com/fleet-parts/fleet-jbr/$fleet_docker_platform/jbr-$JBR_VERSION.tar.zst" --output /tmp/jbr.tar.zst     && tar --extract --zstd --file /tmp/jbr.tar.zst --directory "/home/workspace-agent/.cache/JetBrains/Air/artifacts/$JBR_VERSION/jbr" --strip-components=1     && rm -f "/home/workspace-agent/.cache/JetBrains/Air/artifacts/$JBR_VERSION/jbr/lib/src.zip"     && rm -f "/home/workspace-agent/.cache/JetBrains/Air/artifacts/$JBR_VERSION/jbr/lib/server/classes.jsa"     && rm -f "/home/workspace-agent/.cache/JetBrains/Air/artifacts/$JBR_VERSION/jbr/lib/server/classes_nocoops.jsa"     && rm -f /tmp/jbr.tar.zst # buildkit
